questions.question: What is the main subject doing in this video?
questions.answer_key: Riding a snowmobile across a snowy frozen landscape
questions.rationale: Identifies the primary action and activity central to the clip

questions.question: What type of environment or setting is shown?
questions.answer_key: A frozen lake or snowy field with bare trees and clear sky
questions.rationale: Establishes the outdoor winter setting essential for scene comprehension

questions.question: What vehicles are visible in the foreground of the frames?
questions.answer_key: Multiple snowmobiles, including one orange/red and one green/yellow
questions.rationale: Describes visible equipment and suggests group activity or multiple riders

questions.question: What is the perspective or camera viewpoint in this video?
questions.answer_key: First-person view from a snowmobile rider's perspective
questions.rationale: Clarifies the immersive perspective crucial for understanding viewer positioning

questions.question: What visible text or branding appears on the snowmobiles?
questions.answer_key: Green and yellow branding visible on the snowmobiles in frame
questions.rationale: Identifies brand or model information visible on the main equipment
